exhibition.title: re:root WebAR Studio
exhibition.subtitle: photographs that open when you look at them

works.title: Fallen Flower, Resurrected
works.caption: Point your camera at the printed photograph. The still image is the door; the moving image is the room.

works.title: Before / After
works.caption: A second photograph rests on top of the first.

works.title: Gelora Specimen
works.caption: A 3D creature grows out of the photographic surface.

works.title: Six Ways of Seeing One Canal
works.caption: Tap anywhere to switch the interpretive lens.

works.title: A Memory, Perforated

audio.source: the water under nguyen van cu bridge kept my grandmother's voice

works.caption: The caption text is the score. The same words always sound the same.

works.title: Mycelium Node 07
works.caption: This work only opens near the site where the photograph was made.

works.title: Facing East, Where Wood Rises
works.caption: Turn your body east before the work will open.

_schema_notes.overlay.width/height: target-image units: width 1 = printed photo width; height = imageHeight/imageWidth
_schema_notes.overlay.lenses: array of {label, src, text?}; visitor taps to cycle interpretive layers
_schema_notes.trigger: optional gate before AR starts. gps: {lat,lng,radius m}. compass: {heading deg, tolerance deg}. every gate has a 'studio mode' bypass for classroom testing
_schema_notes.audio.sonify: deterministic text-to-melody on target found. source: 'caption' or any string. requires one tap to arm (mobile audio rule)
_schema_notes.nfc: no config needed: write ar.html?work=<slug> URL to an NTAG215 with experiments/01-nfc-writer.html
